target_market_label.zh: 加拿大（《食品药品法规》第23章）
target_market_label.zht: 加拿大（《食品藥品法規》第23章）

title.en: China-to-Canada Food-Contact Materials Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国食品接触材料进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國食品接觸材料進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese GB 4806 food-contact material requirements against Canadian requirements under the Food and Drugs Act, Food and Drug Regulations Division 23, Health Canada voluntary Letters of No Objection, migration and safety expectations, material-specific considerations, bilingual labelling, and market-access responsibilities.
description.zh: 公益性、附来源链接的中国GB 4806食品接触材料要求与加拿大要求差距对照，涵盖《食品药品法》、《食品药品法规》第23章、Health Canada自愿性无异议信、迁移与安全要求、材料专项事项、双语标签及市场准入责任。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國GB 4806食品接觸材料要求與加拿大要求差距對照，涵蓋《食品藥品法》、《食品藥品法規》第23章、Health Canada自願性無異議信、遷移與安全要求、材料專項事項、雙語標籤及市場准入責任。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid for food-contact material exporters considering the Canadian market. It is not legal advice, a Health Canada opinion, a Letter of No Objection, an import clearance decision, a certification decision, or a guarantee of market access. Canada generally does not require pre-market clearance of food packaging materials, but food sellers remain responsible for ensuring packaging does not transfer harmful substances to food. Exporters, importers, and food sellers should verify current Canadian law, intended-use exposure, migration data, material composition, bilingual labelling, and customer-specific LONO expectations with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为考虑进入加拿大市场的食品接触材料出口商提供信息性对照工具，不构成法律意见、Health Canada意见、无异议信、进口放行决定、认证结论或市场准入保证。加拿大通常不要求食品包装材料进行上市前许可，但食品销售者仍须负责确保包装不会向食品迁移有害物质。出口商、进口商和食品销售者在出货或市场投放前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行加拿大法律、预期用途暴露、迁移数据、材料组成、双语标签及客户对LONO的具体要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為考慮進入加拿大市場的食品接觸材料出口商提供資訊性對照工具，不構成法律意見、Health Canada意見、無異議信、進口放行決定、認證結論或市場准入保證。加拿大通常不要求食品包裝材料進行上市前許可，但食品銷售者仍須負責確保包裝不會向食品遷移有害物質。出口商、進口商和食品銷售者在出貨或市場投放前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行加拿大法律、預期用途暴露、遷移數據、材料組成、雙語標籤及客戶對LONO的具體要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese food-contact material exporters targeting Canada must satisfy the Food and Drugs Act and Food and Drug Regulations Division 23 safety rule that packaging must not yield harmful substances to food. Canada generally has no EU-style mandatory pre-market authorization or positive-list scheme for food packaging; Health Canada Letters of No Objection are voluntary advisory opinions, and the food seller retains legal responsibility for safety, migration evidence, intended-use suitability, and bilingual food-label compliance where packaging is sold with food.
answer_first.zh: 面向加拿大的中国食品接触材料出口商须满足《食品药品法》及《食品药品法规》第23章的安全要求，即包装不得向食品释放可能危害消费者健康的物质。加拿大通常没有类似欧盟的强制上市前授权或正面清单制度；Health Canada无异议信属于自愿性咨询意见，食品销售者仍对安全性、迁移证据、预期用途适用性以及包装随食品销售时的双语食品标签合规承担法律责任。
answer_first.zht: 面向加拿大的中國食品接觸材料出口商須滿足《食品藥品法》及《食品藥品法規》第23章的安全要求，即包裝不得向食品釋放可能危害消費者健康的物質。加拿大通常沒有類似歐盟的強制上市前授權或正面清單制度；Health Canada無異議信屬於自願性諮詢意見，食品銷售者仍對安全性、遷移證據、預期用途適用性以及包裝隨食品銷售時的雙語食品標籤合規承擔法律責任。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Canadian federal regulator, Canada.ca Health Canada guidance, Justice Laws primary legislation, or official standards body preferred. Local PDFs and unofficial summaries are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. last_verified and human_reviewed must be updated before publication as reviewed.
